Vendor Evaluation: Video & PR

Summary of vendors evaluated for video production and public relations in 2025, including final selections and pricing.

Selected Vendors

✓ Selected
OWLED Media
Series A Video Production
Series A video ₹33 Lac
✓ Selected
SpaceKayak
Customer & Quick Videos
Customer testimonial (Amsterdam) $4,500
MCP Gateway video (Bangalore) ₹3 Lac
✓ Selected
LaunchSquad
Public Relations
Monthly retainer $18,000/mo

Video Production

4 evaluated
Vendor Services Status
OWLED Media Video, PR, Animation — Bangalore-based, award-winning creative studio. Founded by Ayush Wadhwa (Forbes 30 Under 30 Asia). Clients include CRED, Unacademy, HP, PhonePe. Selected
SpaceKayak Video, Branding, GTM — Creative studio for AI, SaaS & Web3 companies. Offices in Wilmington, DE & Bangalore. 50+ projects shipped, $300M+ funding raised by portfolio. Selected
Lens Media Video, PR — Visual storytelling and digital strategy agency. Evaluated
Identity Labs (Ruchir Jajoo) Video, PR, Personal Branding — Bangalore-based personal branding company focused on audience building for high-net-worth individuals. Evaluated

PR Firms

6 evaluated
Vendor Services Status
LaunchSquad PR, Storytelling, Content Marketing — Award-winning agency founded in 2000. Specializes in tech, AI, fintech. 100+ team members, offices across 7 US cities. Selected
SBS Comms Tech PR, Communications — Clients include GitHub, Cloudflare, Vimeo. Named one of Fast Company's Most Innovative Companies (2024). OnBoard program from $5k/mo. Evaluated
Bulleit Group Tech PR, Narrative-Driven — Specializes in autonomous vehicles, AI, defense tech, fintech. Named Tech Agency of the Year by PRovoke Media. Clients include Google, LinkedIn. Evaluated
Firebrand B2B Tech PR, Content & Digital Marketing — Focus on startups & scale-ups. Covers fintech, cybersecurity, AI, SaaS, health tech. Evaluated
Mission North Strategic Communications — B2B tech & life sciences. Named Fast Company Most Innovative (2024). Clients include Canva, Zoom, Google, Brex. Evaluated
inaggify PR, Video — Evaluated during vendor discovery phase. Evaluated

Full-Service Agencies

6 evaluated
Vendor Services Status
Dentsu Full-Service — Largest ad agency in Japan, 5th globally. Offices in 145 countries. Advertising, PR, digital marketing, and consulting. Evaluated
Growth.cx B2B SaaS Growth Marketing — Full-service agency for startups. Branding, content, SEO, GTM strategy. 150+ brands served. Rejected
Mekanism Full-Service Creative — San Francisco-based (est. 2000). Clients include Peloton, OkCupid, Ben & Jerry's, Salesforce. Harvard Business School case study. Evaluated
FINE Brand Agency — Founded 1994, Portland & SF. Strategy, branding, web design. Clients include Apple, Symantec, Kimpton Hotels. Evaluated
ARGONAUT Advertising — SF-based (est. 2013). Brand building and scaling. Clients include DoorDash, Google, Airbnb. Evaluated
Barrett Hofherr Full-Service Creative — SF-based (est. 2012). Brand strategy, media planning, integrated campaigns. Clients include Chime, DoorDash, eBay, Salesforce. Evaluated
Prepared February 2025 · Confidential
